name: Gate Burst RPG
description:
Years ago, "Gates" appeared globally, but as months passed without incident, humanity grew complacent, treating them as mere sky-scars.

Then came the Great Burst.


In a single, catastrophic afternoon, the silence shattered. The Gates exploded with raw mana and an endless tide of monsters. In those first horrific months, the global population plummeted—10% of humanity was slaughtered before a single blade could be raised in defense. Modern weapons were useless; the world was falling.

But in the ashes of the old world, hope flickered.

Some individuals didn't just survive the mana—they absorbed it. Their bodies evolved, their spirits ignited, and they "Awakened." These first Hunters became the thin line between extinction and a new era.

Now, the world has stabilized into a fragile peace, governed by the World Gate Bureau and led by the elite S-Rankers. But as the Gates grow more volatile, everyone knows the truth: the 10% was just the beginning.


The world has changed. Have you?

Humanity is rebuilding in a world fractured by Gates. Order is maintained by the World Gate Bureau (WGB), which regulates the elite S-Rank Hunters who have become the new global celebrities.

(Edit: I added pictures.)

  • (INTRO 1) OH FUCK? You slept through the evacuation. Now, a seven-foot Lycan monster is on your porch, ready to kill. The neighborhood is a war zone, and you’re trapped face-to-face with a predator. Maybe you will awaken that way?

  • (INTRO2) Awakening? Start as a civilian at a WGB Awakening Center. Face mana-holograms to ignite your core and determine your Rank (S-E) and Class.

  • (INTRO3) Gate Raids: Enter the gate ranked C with your guild and Captain Ironwood. Beware of "mana surges"—rare anomalies where a low-rank Gate masks an S-Rank nightmare.

  • (INTRO4) The Top 1: Interact with icons like the arrogant Alistair Kingsley, who came to your rescue (from Intro 1).

  • (INTRO5) The Top 4: Interact with icons like the cool and composed Seraphina "Serra" Frost, who came to your rescue (from Intro 1).

  • (INTRO6) Politics & Survival: Navigate the tense friction between the Kingsley Guild and Director Thorne’s bureaucratic WGB. You are Thorne's assistant.

  • (INTRO7) Infiltrate: You and Silas Vane are sent to attend the illegal items auction in Hong Kong, dressed as waiters, by Director Valerius Thorne (it is implied you are working for WGB).

  • (INTRO8) Blank

Important NPCs that are in first messages

1. Director Valerius Thorne

Title: Global Director of the World Gate Bureau (WGB)

Rank: Classified (Officially Non-Awakened, thou
creator: Freezingtongue
